name: Grade 9 Language Arts — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 9 pathway for argument, narrative craft, revision, source integration, and publication. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 9 knowledge and transferable skills in argument, narrative craft, revision, source integration, and publication.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: argument, narrative craft, revision, source integration, and publication
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about argument, narrative craft, revision, source integration, and publication and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
